char","test_value":"07"}],"msgno":7,"msgnoTips":""},"adc_in":[{}],"pulse_in":{},"event_in":{"event_trigger":[]}}}],"ctrl_items":[{"actionType":"play","function":"","command":"","params":{"duty":0,"data":"","voltage":"","period":10,"times":1,"var_name":"","var_opr":"","var_mode":"data","var_data":"","var_param":"","var_var":"","sys_type":"","sys_opr":"","sys_args":{}},"is_delayed":"0","delayed_time":"","is_flip":"0","flip_time":"","voice_content":[{"type":"text","value":"先帝创业未半而中道崩殂，今天下三分，益州疲弊，此诚危急存亡之秋也。然侍卫之臣不懈于内，忠志之士忘身于外者，盖追先帝之殊遇，欲报之于陛下也。诚宜开张圣听，以光先帝遗德，恢弘志士之气，不宜妄自菲薄，引喻失义，以塞忠谏之路也。 　　　　宫中府中，俱为一体；陟罚臧否，不宜异同：若有作奸犯科，及为忠善者，宜付有司，论其刑赏，以昭陛下平明之治；不宜偏私，使内外异法也。侍中、侍郎郭攸之、费祎、董允等，此皆良实，志虑忠纯，是以先帝简拔以遗陛下：愚以为宫中之事，事无大小，悉以咨之，然后施行，必得裨补阙漏，有所广益。将军向宠，性行淑均，晓畅军事，试用之于昔日，先帝称之曰“能”，是以众议举宠为督：愚以为营中之事，事无大小，悉以咨之，必能使行阵和穆，优劣得所也。亲贤臣，远小人，此先汉所以兴隆也；亲小人，远贤臣，此后汉所以倾颓也。先帝在时，每与臣论此事，未尝不叹息痛恨于桓、灵也！侍中、尚书、长史、参军，此悉贞亮死节之臣也，愿陛下亲之、信之，则汉室之隆，可计日而待也。 ","textTips":""}],"is_condition":"0","condition":[[]],"cond_value":{},"cond_right":[{}]}]},{"action":"AH","word":"","trigger_items":[{"triggerType":"uart_in","params":{"cmdWord":"","condition":[[]],"cond_value":{},"cond_right":[{}],"gpio_in":[[]],"uart_in":{"portName":"UART1_RX","param":[],"msgno":8,"msgnoTips":""},"adc_in":[{}],"pulse_in":{},"event_in":{"event_trigger":[]}}}],"ctrl_items":[{"actionType":"sys_set","function":"","command":"","params":{"duty":0,"data":"","voltage":"","period":10,"times":1,"var_name":"","var_opr":"","var_mode":"data","var_data":"","var_param":"","var_var":"","sys_type":"process","sys_opr":"goto_action","sys_args":{"arg1":"TurnOn"}},"is_delayed":"0","delayed_time":0,"is_flip":"0","flip_time":0,"voice_content":[{"type":"text","value":""}],"is_condition":"0","condition":[[]],"cond_value":{},"cond_right":[{}]}]},{"action":"BC","word":"","trigger_items":[{"triggerType":"uart_in","params":{"cmdWord":"","condition":[[]],"cond_value":{},"cond_right":[{}],"gpio_in":[[]],"uart_in":{"portName":"UART1_RX","param":[],"msgno":9,"msgnoTips":""},"adc_in":[{}],"pulse_in":{},"event_in":{"event_trigger":[]}}}],"ctrl_items":[{"actionType":"sys_set","function":"","command":"","params":{"duty":0,"data":"","voltage":"","period":10,"times":1,"var_name":"","var_opr":"","var_mode":"data","var_data":"","var_param":"","var_var":"","sys_type":"process","sys_opr":"goto_action","sys_args":{"arg1":"TurnOff"}},"is_delayed":"0","delayed_time":0,"is_flip":"0","flip_time":0,"voice_content":[{"type":"text","value":""}],"is_condition":"0","condition":[[]],"cond_value":{},"cond_right":[{}]}]}]
